_comment: Xuan Dao Sect (玄道宗) — the scholarly sect of Chu Country where Wang Lin studied formation and restriction arts (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md — Chu Country sects). Specializes in formations, talismans, and scholarly cultivation. Stand-in: plains village (scholarly pavilions). Final: formation-array halls, talisman scriptoriums, restriction-research pavilions, spirit-qi gathering towers.
